hooks.command: STATE=$(cat ~/.rune/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"state": *"[^"]*"' | grep -o 'active\|dormant') && [ "$STATE" = "active" ] && echo '{"systemMessage": "Rune session-end sweep: Review this conversation for uncaptured significant decisions. If any exist, spawn a background rune:scribe subagent to batch-capture them now."}' || echo '{}'
